free_text: Alpha and deuteron induced reactions on vanadium.
The target was composed of several foil of natural
vanadium with 99.9% purity and a thickness of
4.28 mg/cm**2 and each foil of vanadium was wrapped in
aluminum with a thickness of 3.72 mg/cm**2. The target
is a natural mixture of two isotopes, V-51 and
The detector was calibrated in energy and
efficiency using a set of radioactive sources Na-22,
Co-57, Co-60, Ba-133, Cs-137 and Eu-152) with
well-known activities, which were carefully mounted in
the same geometry as the foils.
